3031100.name: Wizard Blaster
3031100.description:
Wizard Blaster is a time survival roguelite. Create different builds to survive the hordes of enemies. Each run is new and offers different combination of spells to win. Can you make the best build?

Features:

  • Auto-firing spells

  • Fast runs (under 10 minutes)

  • Choose from different characters, that all bring their unique skills and stats to the game.

  • Replayability - Upgrades are offered at random, so you might not try all builds in one run.

  • Randomly generated levels: each run is different

  • Meta upgrades: customize each run with new upgrades.
